title: MPC Interactive Media Protocol (MIM) Message
description: Top-level envelope for all MIM websocket messages (Version 1.0.0 Alpha).

version.description: Protocol version [major].[minor].[patch]. Required for session.start and session.started.

sessionId.description: Session identifier preserved across websocket disconnects.

sequenceNum.description: Monotonic sequence number per sender per session, starting at 1.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp with msec granularity.
